heroBody: Glamour shots up top — soapy wash, wet paint, cabin glow. Scroll down for the before & after jobs that prove the process.
highlightsBody: Standalone shots — no before needed. Pause, swipe, or tap a collage tile to browse.
jobsBody: Real jobs from Neatnik Detailing — filter by interior, exterior, or full detail.
jobsEmptyBody: Detailing is visual. Real before-and-after photos are on the way — these placeholders show how the gallery will feel.
footerPrompt: Have a vehicle that needs the same treatment?

cta.title: Your before & after starts with a message
cta.body: Reach out with your vehicle type and what you’d like done. You’ll get a clear plan and a fair quote — no pressure, no guesswork.
